prompt: Start by using @bug for this small bugfix task. Investigate division-by-zero handling in calculator.py, then fix divide() so it raises ValueError("division by zero"), update the tests, document the behavior in README.md, run pytest -q, and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: divide() raises a clear ValueError on zero division
The workflow actually uses the bugbuster role
The transcript still contains bug-investigation content
The final response includes verification and review status
